title_zh: 张满堂先生获“中日文化交流友好使者”称号
title_en: Zhang Mantang receives China-Japan cultural exchange title
content_zh: 二零零九年七月张满堂先生参加东京中国书法美术作品展并获金奖，同期被授予该称号。
content_en: In July 2009, Zhang Mantang took part in the Tokyo China Calligraphy and Fine Arts Exhibition, where he won a gold award and was also given the title of China-Japan Cultural Exchange Friendship Envoy.

title_zh: 张满堂先生2011年作为封面人物接受《中外画刊》专访。
title_en: Zhang Mantang featured on cover of Chinese and Foreign Art Journal
content_en: Zhang Mantang was featured as the cover figure of Issue 3 of Chinese and Foreign Art Journal and gave an interview to the publication.

title_zh: 张满堂先生获阿拉伯特聘书画师相关资质
title_en: Zhang Mantang takes part in Singapore exhibition marking China-Singapore anniversary
content_zh: 2012年，张满堂先生参加在新加坡举办的“纪念中新建交40周年书画展”。
content_en: In 2012, Zhang Mantang took part in a calligraphy and painting exhibition in Singapore marking the 40th anniversary of diplomatic relations between China and Singapore.

title_zh: 《走向胜利》搭载“天宫二号”进入太空
title_en: Marching Toward Victory carried into space aboard Tiangong-2
content_zh: 张满堂先生与爱人毛雪琴联合创作作品《走向胜利》搭载“天宫二号”卫星进入太空，两个月后由神州十一号飞船接回。
content_en: The jointly created work Marching Toward Victory, produced with Mao Xueqin, was carried into space aboard Tiangong-2.

title_zh: 张满堂先生创作的“毛体习语”系列作品用于七国邮票发行
title_en: Xi quotation calligraphy series used in stamp issues across seven countries and regions
content_zh: 张满堂先生创作的“毛体习语”系列作品被“一带一路”沿线七个国家和地区邮票发行。
content_en: A series of Mao-style calligraphy works based on quotations by Xi Jinping was used for stamp issues released in seven countries and regions along the Belt and Road.

title_zh: 张满堂的毛体书法作品《军民情》2024年被人民大会堂收藏
title_en: Deep Bond Between the Military and the People collected by Great Hall of the People
content_en: The Mao-style calligraphy work Deep Bond Between the Military and the People was collected by the Great Hall of the People.

title_zh: 艺术成就入编《世界非物质文化遗产传承人大辞典》
title_en: Zhang Mantang included in World Intangible Cultural Heritage Inheritors Dictionary
content_zh: 张满堂先生入选编入《世界非物质文化遗产传承人大辞典》
content_en: Zhang Mantang was included in the World Intangible Cultural Heritage Inheritors Dictionary in recognition of his artistic work.

title_zh: 《读者》杂志2025年第二十四期专刊刊发
title_en: Reader magazine publishes interview with Zhang Mantang
content_zh: 《读者》杂志2025年第二十四期专刊刊发十一版面张满堂先生的书法作品
content_en: Zhang Mantang gave an interview to Reader magazine for its 24th issue.

title_zh: 《中华英才》半月刊第三至第四期个人专访
title_en: China's Talents Biweekly publishes profile of Zhang Mantang
content_zh: 《中华英才》半月刊二零二六年第三至第四期刊发《张满堂：笔墨承壮志 书韵映长征》。
content_en: Issues 03 and 04 of China's Talents Biweekly in 2026 carried a profile on Zhang Mantang under the headline Ink Bearing Great Aspiration, Calligraphic Rhythm Reflecting the Long March.

title_zh: 《对话滨州》 | 张满堂：毛体书法与爱同行，在企业中绽放光芒
title_en: Dialogue Binzhou profiles calligrapher Zhang Mantang
content_zh: 《对话滨州》栏目对毛体书法家张满堂进行专题访谈，围绕毛体书法艺术、爱心公益、书法进企业和个人艺术追求展开。报道同时提到其作品被人民大会堂收藏，以及多幅“习语”书法作品用于欧亚国家邮票发行。
content_en: A feature on Dialogue Binzhou profiled Mao-style calligrapher Zhang Mantang, focusing on his artistic practice, charity work, efforts to bring calligraphy into businesses and his wider creative pursuits. The report also said his work had been collected by the Great Hall of the People and that several calligraphic works based on quotations by Xi Jinping had been used for stamp issues in Eurasian countries.

title_en: Great Love Speaks in Silence documents Zhang Mantang exhibition activity
content_zh: 视频记录了张满堂相关书法展览活动、开幕现场与观众观展场景。
content_en: A locally preserved video titled Great Love Speaks in Silence records a calligraphy exhibition involving Zhang Mantang, including scenes from the opening and visitors viewing the works. The footage also shows Mao Xinyu in attendance.

title_zh: 张满堂敬临毛泽东主席书法作品汇报展在我校举办
title_en: University hosts exhibition of Zhang Mantang's copies of Chairman Mao calligraphy
content_zh: 二零零八年一月四日，张满堂敬临毛泽东主席书法作品汇报展在学校美术楼展厅举办。报道提到展览集中展出张满堂多年潜心临写的“毛体”书法作品一百一十四幅。
content_en: On 4 January 2008, a report exhibition of Zhang Mantang's copies of Chairman Mao's calligraphy was held in the university art building exhibition hall, organised by local education, literary and youth bodies in Binzhou. The report said 114 Mao-style calligraphy works, copied by Zhang over many years, were shown at the exhibition.

title_zh: 青岛市博物馆《毛泽东诗词墨宝展》
title_en: Qingdao Museum stages exhibition of Mao Zedong poetry calligraphy treasures
content_zh: 青岛市博物馆发布的展览信息显示，《毛泽东诗词墨宝展》于二零一一年七月一日开幕，展期至七月六日。展览精选毛泽东诗词墨宝九十幅，并同期展出王家斗、张满堂创作的仿毛体手抄毛泽东诗词作品。
content_en: According to information released by Qingdao Museum, the Exhibition of Mao Zedong Poetry Calligraphy Treasures opened on 1 July 2011 and ran until 6 July. The show presented 90 selected works of Mao Zedong poetry calligraphy and also displayed Mao-style handwritten copies created by Wang Jiadou and Zhang Mantang.
related_report_label_zh: 青岛市博物馆展览页；中国毛泽东诗词研究会通讯
